en: A snake's eyes aren't very good, but they can detect movement, so if the hatchling keeps.
ko: 뱀의 눈은 별로 좋지 않지만 움직임은 감지할 수 있어서
ja: ヘビの目はあまり良くないが、動きを感知できる。だからヒナが

en: Its nerve, it may just avoid detection.

vi: binh tinh, no co the tranh duoc bi phat hien.
